channel.title: Frontion Geopolitical Headlines
channel.description: Real-time geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources worldwide

item.title: 🇮🇷🇮🇱⚔️ Iran Fires Missiles at Israel After Beirut Strike
item.description: Israel reported Iran launched missiles toward Israeli territory after Israel struck Beirut, marking a dangerous escalation following the fragile ceasefire. The attack raises fears of wider regional conflict.

item.title: 🛢️💰 OPEC+ Approves Fourth Oil Output Hike Since Hormuz Closure
item.description: OPEC+ agreed to its fourth oil production increase in as many months despite the ongoing US-Iran conflict, approving a 188,000 barrel-per-day hike to compensate for Hormuz Strait disruptions.

item.title: 🇦🇲🇪🇺🗳️ Armenia Election: Pro-EU Party Leads in Exit Polls
item.description: Exit polls show Prime Minister Nikol Pashinyan pro-EU ruling party leading in Armenia parliamentary elections, a pivotal vote for the South Caucasus nation geopolitical future amid peace efforts with Azerbaijan.

item.title: 🇳🇵🇮🇳 Nepal FM Signals Diplomatic Approach to India Border Row
item.description: Nepal Foreign Minister Shisir Khanal said no boundary is too complex if tackled with an open heart, signaling a diplomatic push to resolve territorial disputes with India and strengthen bilateral ties.

item.title: 🇽🇰🗳️ Kosovo Election: Kurti Party Leads With 43.72%
item.description: Preliminary results show Prime Minister Albin Kurti Vetevendosje party leading Kosovo early parliamentary election, the third vote in 18 months amid political impasse.

item.title: 🇮🇷🇮🇱 Iran fires missiles at Israel for first time since April ceasefire
item.description: Israel struck Beirut's southern suburbs on Sunday, prompting Iran to launch missiles at Israeli territory. The attack marks a major escalation after weeks of fragile ceasefire negotiations.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇰🇵 Xi Jinping arrives in Pyongyang for summit with Kim Jong Un
item.description: Chinese President Xi Jinping visits North Korea as Kim Jong Un projects confidence with firm Russian ties and nuclear arsenal, showing little appetite for engagement with Washington.

item.title: 🇬🇧 Chagos Islands: US Considers Buying Strategic Archipelago
item.description: The US is exploring the purchase of the Chagos Islands in the Indian Ocean, a strategic archipelago that could strengthen American presence in the Indo-Pacific amid growing competition with China.

item.title: 🇫🇷🇮🇱 France Warns More Israel Sanctions Coming Within Days
item.description: France announced additional sanctions on Israeli settlers could be imposed within days, reflecting European frustration over continued settlement expansion in the West Bank.

item.title: 🇨🇫🇺🇸 Central African Republic Accepts US Deportees
item.description: The Central African Republic agreed to accept third-country deportees from the United States, expanding Trump's immigration enforcement partnerships to Africa.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine War Momentum Shifts as Russia Struggles
item.description: Strategic analysis argues Ukraine is not losing and Russia is not winning. The war's momentum has shifted with Ukrainian strikes bringing the conflict home to Russian territory.

item.title: 🇹🇼 Taiwan Coast Guard Expels Chinese Ships from Restricted Waters
item.description: Taiwan's coast guard expelled Chinese vessels from restricted waters near the island, highlighting ongoing tensions in the Taiwan Strait as Beijing continues pressure operations.

item.title: 🇻🇦 Hundreds of Thousands Line Madrid Streets to See Pope Leo
item.description: Massive crowds gathered in Madrid as Pope Leo made his first major public appearance in Spain, underscoring the Vatican's continued influence in European Catholic communities.

item.title: 🇿🇦 South Africa Vows Crackdown on Xenophobic Attackers
item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa pledged action against groups behind xenophobic attacks targeting foreign nationals in South Africa, following deadly violence in recent weeks.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Threatens US Targets Over Lebanon Escalation
item.description: Iran's top negotiator warned of potential attacks on American targets if the US continues its military support for Israel's operations in Lebanon, raising stakes in the regional conflict.

item.title: 🇮🇷 IAEA Demands Iran Open Sites, Uranium Stocks
item.description: A US-led resolution at the IAEA demands Iran open up its nuclear sites and account for uranium stockpiles, as the UN watchdog seeks transparency amid the ongoing conflict.

item.title: 🇵🇰 Pakistan Kashmir Court Orders Refugee Seats
item.description: Pakistan's Supreme Court ruled that seats must be reserved for Kashmiri refugees in upcoming regional elections, addressing long-standing demands from displaced communities.

item.title: 🇱🇧 IDF Reveals Hezbollah Command Tunnel Network
item.description: The Israeli Defense Forces revealed a key Hezbollah command and tunnel network near the Beaufort Castle in southern Lebanon, showcasing ongoing militant infrastructure.

item.title: 🇮🇷 IRGC-Linked Media: Iran Will Respond to Beirut Strikes
item.description: IRGC-linked media outlets declared that Iran would respond to Israeli strikes on Beirut, signaling potential escalation beyond the fragile ceasefire agreement.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇨🇫 US Sending Third-Country Deportees to Central African Republic
item.description: The US will send third-country deportees to the Central African Republic as the Trump administration expands immigration enforcement partnerships to Africa.

item.title: 🇺🇸 CBS News: Iran-US War Live Coverage
item.description: CBS News provides ongoing live coverage of the Iran-US conflict, Israel-Hezbollah fighting, and international ceasefire efforts as regional tensions escalate.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Female Navy Officers Fear Career Cap After Hegseth Cuts Women from Promotions
item.description: Female Navy officers express concerns about career limitations after Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth removed women from key promotion lists, raising questions about military leadership diversity.

item.title: 🇬🇧 UK Military 'Tearing Its Hair Out' Over Defense Cuts
item.description: British military leaders express frustration over continued defense cuts amid rising global threats, with sources describing the situation as tearing its hair out over budget constraints.

item.title: 🇦🇲 Armenians Vote With Peace Efforts and Russia Focus
item.description: Armenians head to polls in parliamentary elections that could determine the nation's geopolitical alignment between the West and Russia amid ongoing peace negotiations with Azerbaijan.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Top Negotiator Threatens US Targets Over Lebanon
item.description: Iran's top negotiator threatens US targets over Lebanon escalation as tensions rise in the Middle East following Israeli strikes on Beirut.
